mapper.select: SELECT content_id, tenant_id, content_nm, content_type, content_url, content_desc, duration_minutes, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_content WHERE content_id = #{contentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_content (content_id, tenant_id, content_nm, content_type, content_url, content_desc, duration_minutes, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{tenantId}, #{contentTitle}, #{contentType}, #{contentUrl}, #{contentDesc}, #{durationMinutes}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_content SET content_nm = #{contentTitle}, content_type = #{contentType}, content_url = #{contentUrl}, content_desc = #{contentDesc}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, use_yn = #{useYn}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.content_id, c.tenant_id, c.content_nm, c.content_type, c.content_url, c.content_desc, c.duration_minutes, c.use_yn, c.reg_dt, c.upd_dt FROM tb_content c WHERE c.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.reg_dt DESC
